creator: bacon@smithers.neuro.mcw.edu
text:
Another correction is needed.  I noticed after submitting the port that 
linux_devtools has gone away.  This was a prerequisite under older ports 
snapshots for compiling MEX files from within Matlab.

I've written a wrapper that will allow compiling MEX files using 
linux_dist-gentoo-stage3.

I'll submit a unified diff after some testing.  In the meantime, anyone 
interested in trying it can download the port framework from 
http://www.neuro.mcw.edu/~bacon/FreeBSD_MRI/

	JB
